title: neohouzeaua helferi
intro: Neohouzeaua helferi is a species of plant in the family Dipterocarpaceae, commonly known as a type of rainforest tree native to the Philippines. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Neohouzeaua helferi include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Neohouzeaua helferi can be found in the form of decoctions, infusions, or extracts, which are often used to treat various ailments in folk medicine.
